judge_result.short_rationale: The answer includes washing and a post-wash covering step, but it changes the required order by telling the worker to remove clothing first instead of starting with washing as in the source. It weakens the required escalation by making specialist/doctor consultation conditional on symptoms, while the canonical truth says to consult after any confirmed skin exposure. Added details like soap, 15–20 minutes, removing shoes/clothes, and avoiding solvents are not grounded in the provided truth. Usable language, but somewhat over-detailed and less traceable to the source.
